Speaker.rawBytes: E6 9C AA E4 BD BF E7 94 A8

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA035
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You desire power? Then allow me to be your holy blade.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA036
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With this light of mine that destroys all, let us extinguish the evil lurking within the shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA037
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}'Tis an honor to serve you. I shall become thy strength, and together we shall exterminate all demons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA038
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall spill my blood for you to unleash the magic coursing through my veins.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA039
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Snip, snip... I'd cut the thread of fate just to be at your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA040
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh? I see you've awakened to the power of creation. In which case, I shall serve at your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA041
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My aid shall be readily available to a soul as bright and pure as yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall grant thee mine abyss of power...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA043
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let my song and dance stir your heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA044
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let the strength of thine heart guide us as we embark on this journey together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA045
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Burn with rage, let it empower you! Together, we shall ravage the battlefield![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA046
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You'll play with me, won't you? Forever and ever?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA047
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall guide your heart so that you too can fill both the skies and earth with love.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA048
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you desire vengeance, then summon me and I shall seek it for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA049
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come together with me now... Hehe, I'll gift you some pleasant dreams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA050
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The power of my brilliant light shall shield you from peril.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Filth is my power, and therefore thine as well. To thee, I offer mine all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The battlefield beckons... Let us march forward—together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA053
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I am that which maintains the universe, that which eradicates evil. I, invincibility incarnate, shall guide thine heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA054
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The flame of God, executor of justice... This power of mine shall now be at your disposal.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA055
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall become your strength and secure you a future filled with days of love and war...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA056
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall be at your side forevermore. May the heavens protect you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA057
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My sword, my bow—both tools that have created a fine nation—shall now be yours to wield.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA058
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}O valiant one, with my spear, I shall wage war on thine enemies and lead thee to battle...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA059
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}In this world where madness and sanity intertwine... allow me to be your guide.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA060
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll devour anyone who dares to stand in your way![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA061
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, let me guess... You need my power, right? The power of the fairy king?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Birthed from thine heart to walk at thy side, 'twas I. Now my wisdom shall be thine to use.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA063
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I FAITHFUL WATCHDOG. WILL WALK AT YOUR SIDE.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA064
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I am thou... Thou art I. From the sea of thy soul, I cometh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA065
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}From the sea of thy soul, I cometh... Master of strings, {f 2 4 1}...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let us search for the answer to life's greatest question, together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA066
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Be it past, present, future... Tell me what your heart most desires.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA067
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hiya, mister! Us two are of one body, one soul, so I guess that means I'm followin' you all the way to Hell![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA068
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With you around, I can rampage all I want![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA069
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now that I'm here, I guarantee you will never have to be concerned about misfortune again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA070
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Um... Play nice, okay? No bullying now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA071
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let us herald the birth of a new power here and now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA072
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall be thy wings—wings that shall lift thine heart beyond the stars.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA073
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you dare defy logic and reason? Then, together, we shall see it through to the very end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA074
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll protect that sparkle in those starry eyes of yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA075
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should you find yourself along the border of life and death, I shall lend you my powers and be your guide.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA076
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}MY SELF DEFORMED. MY POWER NOW YOURS.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA077
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you dare cheat on me, I will hunt you down myself and kill you. You better shape up if you want me to be yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA078
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If you are ever in need of my evil eye, prove to me how well you can wield my power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA079
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your hee-foe is my hee-foe! I'll freeze everything in your way, ho![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA080
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The power of the fairy queen shall be yours to wield, should you wish it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA081
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}As long as this spear remains unshattered, I shall continue to fight. Come, let us devastate the battlefield.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA082
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like I'll have a blast fighting with you. C'mon, let's get wild.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA083
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll make sure you stay in shape. C'mon, we can take on this mystery of a world together, just you and me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA084
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Don't go blowing your own horn just because you've made me into an ally.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA085
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With my beak and claws, I'll tear all your enemies asunder![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA086
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll spin the thread of destiny ever at your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA087
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall bring you fertility and the path to the future. From now on, this body shall follow you wherever you go...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA088
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My wisdom, capable of foretelling auspicious futures, shall now serve you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA089
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall be your all-seeing eyes, protecting you from all demons.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA090
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mine authority that commands all powers... I shall now present to thee.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA091
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Love should always be nurtured. Allow me to guide you so that your love does not stray.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA092
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You want to be with me? Then I'll keep you company, night after night, for the rest of your days.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA093
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}O fearless mortal, I have now become thy power. Together, let us behold the end of the world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA094
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have been waiting for this moment... From now on, I shall always be at your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA095
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I will follow thee henceforth, and burn thine enemies in my flames.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA096
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To you, challenger of fate, I shall be the poison you inflict.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA097
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hear my songs that invoke the power of your heart... From now on, I will be by your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA098
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}ME SACRED POWER... CAN YOU WIELD WELL?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA099
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your prayers grant me the strength to battle. Let us fight together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA100
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With the power of my magical sand, I'll bless you with a sweet dream.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA101
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My power is now yours. Together, we shall be invincible. Now let us ride towards death![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA102
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}YOU WILL GET REWARD. DON'T WORRY, BE HAPPY.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA103
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Allow me to demonstrate the power of destruction and rebirth. Come, let us dance together...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I won't go easy on anyone who challenges us. I'll see to it that you put my powers to good use![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA105
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My mission is to protect and defend the world. I shall serve as your strength to help you achieve greatness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA106
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll teach you hee-how to walk and talk like a badass, ho![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA107
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It is the highest honor to serve under your command. Please use my life however you see fit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oho? Well, aren't you a strapping young lad—just like me, hee-ho! Nice to meet you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll light up your path for you, hee-ho![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heh, I never would have thought that I, an inventor of countless weapons, would serve as a weapon myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA111
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Your heart shall be in my care from now. I'll be sure to treat it kindly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA112
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My power will be yours from here on out. Come, let us strengthen your soul even more...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA113
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have emerged from the dark depths of your heart to give you strength... I shall be at your side henceforth.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA114
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Like a firelight that illuminates the future, I shall be your wings, guiding you from here on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA115
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So you desire the power of my raging storms, do you? Very well then... I shall rage to your heart's content.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA117
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Witness the might of my flames that will rain destruction unto the world... Burn the sight of carnage into your eyes![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA118
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Allow me to accompany you on your journey. With me at your side, you will be a thousand strong![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA119
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I bestow upon you this power... One belonging to the noblest of the four celestial creatures.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA120
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If anyone dares to bother you, I'll strangle them to death without batting an eye.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA121
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you wish for the power to kill, even if others abhor you? If so, accept me into your heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA122
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall watch as your noble soul grows from beside you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA123
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You who takes the high road... Let me be your wheels and assist you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA124
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To celebrate our combined strength, I'm gonna rampage all I want![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA125
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thou, with a body not of rot and decay but flesh and blood... Let us welcome the day of salvation together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA126
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My thunder that rumbles the skies... I shall wield its full power in your presence.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA127
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall remain at your side to protect that unfettered soul of yours...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA128
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I was born of thee, and I shall walk by thy side...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA129
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everything I am belongs to you. Call for me anytime![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA130
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let us both be tarnished by darkness and corruption... And together, anything will be possible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA131
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall stay by your side to witness the many faces you wear.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA132
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'd love for us to enjoy a wonderful, midsummer night's dream... together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA133
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Pray to me rather than the stars. I'll lend you my strength and power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA134
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall become yet another face of yours. Together, let us unleash the magic within you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA135
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By the might of my iron hammer, I shall send your enemies to their graves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA136
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall accompany you with my holy power, one that will strike down darkness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA137
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}O noble one who harbors me... Let us sound the trumpets of calamity together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA138
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wanted to spend the rest of my life singing and dancing, but I guess that's not gonna work out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA139
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall now wield the power of my clan for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA140
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now, tell me... What is it like to gaze upon beauty and perfection?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA141
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}From now on... I shall dwell within the roots of your heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA142
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Serenity is the true protector of repose... I shall follow you in search of peace.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA143
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall be your furrocious vanguard and lead you to victory, meow![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA144
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm getting up in years, but I'll do my best to take care of you from now on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA145
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My power, that of the general of Hell, is yours to use.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA146
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall accompany you from here on. May good fortune find you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA147
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You must not know fear to have summoned me... Heh, how interesting. I guess you can use my power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA148
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall become your strength and bestow upon you an entire mountain of blessings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA149
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm not just any regular ol' Pixie. I'll show you I can live up to my name![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA150
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I advise thee to use my power well, and together we shall reign over this desert of a world...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA151
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Feast your eyes on my sword's mighty power! It is sure to bend all to our will![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA152
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}From here on out, you and I are two sides of the same coin... If you know what is best for you, then trust in my power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA153
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall watch over your growth, ever at your side...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA154
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've taken a liking to your honesty. Allow me to protect you from tragedy.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA155
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall be the shield that protects you from all danger, from now until death.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA156
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I think I'll have lots of fun playing with you! C'mon, let's go! Heehee![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA157
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I suppose it would be more interesting to follow you rather than devouring you whole...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA158
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall slay each and every one of your foes, for I am your power and your strength![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA159
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}If thou desirest the power to reign over a hundred beasts... then call my name and summon me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA160
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Luck is sure to come spinning your way! You've got me, after all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA161
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Allow me to show you a secret chant that will grant you all of my power...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA162
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I am the deity of swords that brought stability to this great land. I shall help temper the blade of your heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA163
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The power to see both past and future... Let it be the flame that protects your heart. This, I tell you, is no lie.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA164
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Law and authority should be upheld before anything else. I shall become your strength and defend your honor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA165
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should your soul beckon, I shall rise from Hades to answer the call...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA166
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I have laid waste to my enemies on the battlefield with all one hundred of my hands, and now I shall bring you victory.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA167
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fear not, my lord. I hereby swear loyalty to you and only you... Heheheh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA168
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Don't fall off, now. We're gonna ride to the depths of Hell at full throttle![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA169
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With my secret art of spirit slaying... thine enemies will experience true hell.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA170
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Oh, how tiresome... But it looks like I have no choice in the matter. With you, I shall go.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA171
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall now accompany thee, one who hath wings in thine heart, on thy journey...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA172
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll be your wings from now! Come, let us fly into the light![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA173
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}For as long as I am with thee, I shall grant thee victory with my power...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA174
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no point trying to hide your innermost desires from me... for the two of us are one now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA175
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So you desire the power that belongs to the queen of filth? Heehee... All right, dear child, you may have it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA176
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Now, bring me to thine enemies... I shall slaughter them all with my sword.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA177
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My infinite power, one that can swallow both the earth and heaven, is now yours...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA178
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let's get our blood boiling! Come, now we dance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA179
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall follow your pure and noble heart. My holy power is yours to wield.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA180
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You and I shall be of one sound body, one sound mind, henceforth. Let nature's vigor overflow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA181
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall journey alongside you and correct all that disturbs harmony.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA182
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The sun known as hope shall shine upon you and your heart that challenges all adversities.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA183
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The heart of salvation that had been nurtured within you... Let it now be freed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA184
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I, the voice of God, shall form a contract with you. With our power, we shall preserve the balance of this world.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA185
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall protect your heart of righteousness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA186
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm the spirit of your shadow... So that means I'm always gonna be with you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA187
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I NOW KNOW WHO ME. YOU AND ME THE SAME... YES?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA188
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall become a part of you, so that the power of the underworld shall be yours to use.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA189
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall devour every single one of the corrupted and the wicked who stand against you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA190
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Can you sense my sacred aura? If so, then I shall be the wings that guide you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA191
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This power of mine, not unlike that of a flood, is now yours to command...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA192
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall protect your pure and untainted heart with everything in my power.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA194
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let the power that joineth the heavens and earth aid thee on thy journey.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA195
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Those who stand against you shall be struck with terror and despair.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA196
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Stop drooling over my beauty already. Now, let us dance a dance that'll bless us with good fortune.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA197
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall measure the thread of life, guiding you down the path you choose.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA198
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let my power be yours and bless you with a healthy body and soul.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA199
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall turn the flames of vengeance into a fiery force for you to wield...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA200
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are me, and I am you. Don't you dare die and leave me behind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA201
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heehee... Very well, I shall share my power with you. But that means you won't leave my side—not now, not ever.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA202
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}From now on, I am all yours... Let's have a fun night neither of us will forget.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA203
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll stay by your side from now on. We'll always be together, even in your dreams.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA204
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I am {f 2 4 1}, the bright morning star that rises in the darkness of lament.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}To thee who walketh the world of darkness born from sinners' hearts, I shall obey this secret covenant and be thy strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA205
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My name is {f 2 4 1}... the fallen one who dwells deep within thine heart.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This power of mine shall serve thee whose soul burneth strong and bright.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA206
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The power of my troops will always be at your command...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA207
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall nurture you and give you strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA208
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}With our powers combined, we can put an end to everything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA300
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall become the wings of rebellion, and together, we shall savor the taste of victory![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA301
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come, hoist the flag of virtue within your heart, and let us wreak havoc together![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA302
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My blade, meant to help the weak and crush the strong... I entrust it to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA303
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Finally... We can now forge a contract. The two of us are connected by fate, don't you see?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA304
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I am {f 2 4 1}, the greatest thief underneath the heavens.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let us now forge a contract, and I shall always follow your lead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA305
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Never lose sight of your convictions... Also, be careful not to get flung off, now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA306
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hehe, so you wish to sign a contract with me? Then, tell me... Who shall you betray?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA307
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My arrows will always strike true, for as long as justice resides within your heart![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA308
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Rather than accepting a life in cinders, you would strive for glory? Then let me cast a spell on you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA309
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You are willing to walk the same path as me, one who rebels against God? Very well. I shall tear through every obstacle in your way...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA310
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You got me—an outlaw who has traversed all of the heavens, the earth, and the underworld—shaking with excitement![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA311
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thou whose soul opposeth fate... I shall cooperate with thee for as long as my power dwelleth within thine heart.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA312
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall make them pay for their sins. Come now, let us sign a contract... and my magic will be all yours.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA313
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My emotions have assumed an unconventional form... I shall take their raging power and transform them into beauty.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA314
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I—the entity who governs over both beauty and power—entrust all that I am... to you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA315
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I, the Queen of Heaven, shall now become a part of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA316
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All this talk about justice, about friendship... It's foolish. Incredibly foolish. I'll destroy it all...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA317
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Let purity, virtue, and beauty lift our wings and let us soar![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA318
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Open thine eyes and release the power dwelling within...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA319
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I shall watch over you, the light in darkness, as you traverse your chosen path...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_COMBINE_PERSONA320
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Thou who challengeth the peculiar moonlight... Let me be thy strength.[n]{f 1 1}
